title: Childish Joke told by my son
markdown:
“What does a rooster say when it is pooping?”


“Cocka\-doodle\-doo\-doo!”

 on Saturday, June 3rd, 2006 at 7:54 am and is filed under [Uncategorized](http://www.suburbandestiny.com/?cat=1 "View all posts in Uncategorized").
